title: Gooey Spanish Tomato Stir-Fry
description: An earthy and gooey one-pot dish featuring tomatoes, cilantro, and a touch of spice to complement the low-fat-friendly cooking style.
instructions: Chop tomatoes and onions into small pieces.
Dice garlic finely. Toast the diced onions in olive oil over medium heat until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add sliced tomatoes to the onions and cook for an additional 5 minutes or until they begin to soften.
Sauté chopped garlic for another minute before adding salt, black pepper, and chili flakes if using. Stir well.
Pour in canned diced tomatoes and stir. Adjust seasoning as needed based on taste preference.
Simmer gently for about 10-15 minutes or until the sauce thickens slightly, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
Taste and adjust flavors again if necessary before removing from heat.
